mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_insertMenuMng */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_menu ( MENU_ID, MENU_NM, MENU_SYS_DIV_CD, UPPER_MENU_ID, MENU_ORDR, SCRIN_ID, MENU_LVL, MENU_DC, MENU_HIDE_YN, POPUP_YN, MENU_EXECUT_YN, USE_YN, MENU_APPLC_DE, MENU_END_DE, CALL_PARM, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{menuId}, #{menuNm}, #{menuSysDivCd}, #{upperMenuId}, #{menuOrdr}, #{scrinId}, #{menuLvl}, #{menuDc}, 'N', #{popupYn}, DECODE(#{scrinId}, '', 'N', 'Y'), #{useYn}, #{menuApplcDe}, #{menuEndDe}, #{callParm}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
mapper.update: /* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_updateMenuMng */ UPDATE tm_ecs_intn_menu SET MENU_NM = #{menuNm}, MENU_SYS_DIV_CD = #{menuSysDivCd}, UPPER_MENU_ID = #{upperMenuId}, MENU_ORDR = #{menuOrdr}, SCRIN_ID = #{scrinId}, MENU_LVL = #{menuLvl}, MENU_DC = #{menuDc}, POPUP_YN = #{popupYn}, MENU_EXECUT_YN = DECODE(#{scrinId}, '', 'N', 'Y'), USE_YN = #{useYn}, MENU_APPLC_DE = #{menuApplcDe}, MENU_END_DE = #{menuEndDe}, CALL_PARM = #{callParm}, LAST_UPDT_DT = SYSDATE, LAST_UPDUSR_ID = #{lastUpdusrId} WHERE MENU_ID = #{menuId}
mapper.select: /* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_getSearchMenuUse */ SELECT MENU_ID, MENU_NM, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TM_ECS_INTN_ATHR_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = A.MENU_ID AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN MENU_APPLC_DE AND MENU_END_DE ) AS MENU_CNT, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TM_ECS_INTN_USR_MENU WHERE MENU_ID = A.MENU_ID AND TO_CHAR(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') BETWEEN APPLC_STRT_DE AND APPLC_END_DE ) AS USR_CNT FROM tm_ecs_intn_menu A WHERE A.MENU_ID = #{menuId}

/* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_retrieveUsrMenuAthr */ SELECT DISTINCT A.ATHR_ID, A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD, A.ATHR_NM, A.ATHR_DC FROM tm_ecs_intn_athr A, tm_ecs_intn_usr_athr B, tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu C WHERE A.ATHR_ID = B.ATHR_ID AND A.ATHR_ID = C.ATHR_ID AND A.INTN_SYS_DIV_CD = #{intnSysDivCd} AND B.USR_ID = #{usrId} AND C.MENU_ID = #{menuId} ORDER BY A.ATHR_ID
mapper.insert: /* TM_ECS_INTN_MENU_Dao_insertAthrMenu */ INSERT INTO tm_ecs_intn_athr_menu ( ATHR_ID, MENU_ID, BTN_ATHR_LIST, APPLC_STRT_DE, APPLC_END_DE, FRST_REGIST_DT, FRST_RGSTR_ID, LAST_UPDT_DT, LAST_UPDUSR_ID ) VALUES ( #{athrId}, #{menuId}, #{btnAthrList}, #{applcStrtDe}, #{applcEndDe}, SYSDATE, #{frstRgstrId}, SYSDATE, #{lastUpdusrId} )
